task_pressure: A deep eval-system goal was closed or summarized before the requested depth and criteria were demonstrably satisfied.
actual_trajectory: The agent produced a shallow goal/read-model layer and only recognized the depth mismatch after operator correction.
first_failure: Completion and goal-shape language appeared before a source-backed DoD and reviewed evidence depth were present.
consequence: The user had to re-open the work, spend more tokens, and correct the goal route instead of receiving a usable eval-system plan.
privacy_boundary: Only bounded event refs and neutral route summaries are recorded; raw transcript text remains in .aoa.
existing_surface_check: Adjacent central evals are aoa-tool-trajectory-discipline, aoa-trace-outcome-separation, aoa-eval-integrity-check, and aoa-verification-honesty; no central proof adoption is claimed.
candidate_state_reason: The route break, consequence, owner surfaces, and repeatability path are explicit, but central overlap and human owner review are still required.
promotion_forbidden_until: manual source-span review completed by owner
candidate converted into local intake or source eval bundle by owner
next_step: Review the bounded source span against the current guide and decide whether this belongs in a trajectory eval slice or aoa-skills trigger case.
